headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -25.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 40% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 145 quotes, including 104 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 35.9 sits in the middle range for this period, though it dropped notably from yesterday's much higher peak of 69.5.

• Both fears and optimism remain subdued below their typical ranges, with fears declining further from yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
